creator: info@babaei.net
text:
Well, the maintainer won't support 3.3.7 anymore since the latest release in 3.x branch is 3.3.9 which was released around two weeks ago. Earlier, I made a patch to upgrade to 3.3.8 and it never hit the ports due to a bug in Poudriere builds (issue #222920). I'll try to make a new patch for 3.3.9 and see if it resolves the issue with Poudriere and submit it here. I guess if it won't work then I have to patch it myself.

When will boost-1.66.0 hit the ports?
